003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.security.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
026
027import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
028
029/**
030 * {@link AuthFilter} that authenticates requests carrying an OAuth 2.0 / OIDC access token via the
031 * standard <a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6750">RFC 6750 Bearer Token</a>
032 * scheme.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Mirrors {@code BearerTokenAuthFilter}'s shape but routes through an OAuth-flavored {@link TokenValidator}:
036 *
037 * <ul>
038 *    <li>{@link OAuthIntrospectionValidator} for opaque tokens (RFC 7662).
039 *    <li>{@code JwtTokenValidator} (from {@code juneau-rest-server-auth-jwt}) for JWT access tokens (the
040 *       OIDC-default case).
041 * </ul>
042 *
043 * <p>
044 * Roles are extracted from a configurable claim (default: {@code "scope"} &mdash; values are split on
045 * whitespace per RFC 6749 &sect;3.3).
046 *
047 * <h5 class='topic'>Usage</h5>
048 *
049 * <p class='bjava'>
050 *    AuthFilterChain.<jsm>create</jsm>(<jv>bs</jv>)
051 *       .append(OAuthFilter.<jsm>create</jsm>()
052 *          .pattern(<js>"/api/*"</js>)
053 *          .validator(<jv>introspectionValidator</jv>)
054 *          .build())
055 *       .build();
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
059 * <ul>
060 *    <li class='jc'>{@link OAuthIntrospectionValidator}
061 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AuthFilter}
062 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6750">RFC 6750 &mdash; Bearer Token Usage</a>
063 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/AuthFilterFramework">AuthN Filter Framework</a>
064 * </ul>
065 *
066 * @since 10.0.0
067 */
068@SuppressWarnings({
069   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are OAuth protocol header names and grant type values; intentional
070})
071public class OAuthFilter extends AuthFilter {
072
073   private static final String DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM = "scope";
074   private static final String AUTHORIZATION = "Authorization";
075   private static final String BEARER_PREFIX = "Bearer ";
076
077   /**
078    * Static creator.
079    *
080    * @return A new builder.
081    */
082   public static Builder create() {
083      return new Builder();
084   }
085
086   /**
087    * Builder.
088    */
089   public static class Builder {
090      private TokenValidator validator;
091      private String realm = "api";
092      private String rolesClaim = DEFAULT_ROLES_CLAIM;
093
094      /** Constructor. */
095      protected Builder() {}
096
097      /**
098       * Sets the {@link TokenValidator}.  Required.
099       *
100       * @param value The validator.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
101       * @return This object.
102       */
103      public Builder validator(TokenValidator value) {
104         validator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
105         return this;
106      }
107
108      /**
109       * Sets the {@code WWW-Authenticate: Bearer realm="<value>"} challenge realm.
110       *
111       * @param value The realm.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
112       * @return This object.
113       */
114      public Builder realm(String value) {
115         realm = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
116         return this;
117      }
118
119      /**
120       * Sets the claim used to extract roles.  Defaults to {@code "scope"}; values are split on
121       * whitespace per RFC 6749 &sect;3.3.
122       *
123       * @param value The claim name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
124       * @return This object.
125       */
126      public Builder rolesClaim(String value) {
127         rolesClaim = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
128         return this;
129      }
130
131      /**
132       * Builds the filter.
133       *
134       * @return A new {@link OAuthFilter}.
135       */
136      public OAuthFilter build() {
137         if (validator == null)
138            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthFilter requires a TokenValidator");
139         return new OAuthFilter(this);
140      }
141   }
142
143   private final TokenValidator validator;
144   private final String challenge;
145   private final String rolesClaim;
146
147   /**
148    * Constructor.
149    *
150    * @param b The builder.
151    */
152   protected OAuthFilter(Builder b) {
153      this.validator = b.validator;
154      this.challenge = "Bearer realm=\"" + b.realm + "\"";
155      this.rolesClaim = b.rolesClaim;
156   }
157
158   @Override /* Overridden from AuthFilter */
159   public Optional<AuthResult> authenticate(HttpServletRequest req) throws AuthenticationException {
160      var header = req.getHeader(AUTHORIZATION);
161      if (header == null || !header.regionMatches(true, 0, BEARER_PREFIX, 0, BEARER_PREFIX.length()))
162         return oe();
163      var token = header.substring(BEARER_PREFIX.length()).trim();
164      if (token.isEmpty())
165         return oe();
166      var principal = validate(token);
167      return o(AuthResult.of(principal, extractRoles(principal)));
168   }
169
170   private Principal validate(String token) throws AuthenticationException {
171      try {
172         var p = validator.validate(token);
173         if (p == null)
174            throw new AuthenticationException("Token validator returned null").wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
175         return p;
176      } catch (AuthenticationException e) {
177         var hasChallenge = e.getHeaders().stream()
178            .anyMatch(h -> "WWW-Authenticate".equalsIgnoreCase(h.getName()));
179         if (!hasChallenge)
180            e.wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
181         throw e;
182      } catch (RuntimeException e) {
183         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "OAuth token validation failed").wwwAuthenticate(challenge);
184      }
185   }
186
187   private Set<String> extractRoles(Principal principal) {
188      if (!(principal instanceof ClaimsPrincipal cp))
189         return Collections.emptySet();
190      var v = cp.getClaims().get(rolesClaim);
191      if (v == null)
192         return Collections.emptySet();
193      var out = new HashSet<String>();
194      if (v instanceof String s) {
195         for (var piece : s.split("\\s+"))
196            if (!piece.isBlank())
197               out.add(piece);
198      } else if (v instanceof Collection<?> list) {
199         for (var item : list)
200            if (item instanceof String s)
201               out.add(s);
202      }
203      return out;
204   }
205}
